'''Tharb''' was the codename of a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] informer on [[Tarhassan]]. His species is unknown, he was short though, with a deep voice. He worked at [[Corgan's Gustatorium]] restaurant as a server, which is where he gave information to [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]] officer [[Edbit Teeks]].

==Appearances==
*{{InsiderCite|73|The League of Spies|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
